'''鈭歵-b-sh-dh''' ('''katabshedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zig|zig]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zig|zig]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-b-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| katabshedhoko
|}
